app.name: Maegami
global.title: All Layers
general.title: General
global.opacity.title: Opacity
global.opacity.desc: How transparent the whole window is. Shared by every layer.
global.cursorMask.title: Peek around the cursor
global.cursorMask.desc: Cut a hole in the image around the cursor so you can peek at the desktop below. It goes through all layers.
global.maskRadius.title: Peek hole radius
global.maskRadius.desc: Size of the cut-out circle. The edge blur scales along with it.
global.cursorTrail.title: Leave a trail for a while
global.cursorTrail.desc: Instead of closing right away, the area you sweep with the cursor stays cut open like paint, so you can keep peeking. The trail fades away little by little over time.
global.trailDuration.title: Time until the trail fades
global.trailDuration.desc: How long it takes a trail to close completely. Longer keeps the painted area visible for more time.
global.language.title: Language
global.language.desc: Display language for the menu and settings window.
layer.title: Layer {n}
layer.hint: Higher-numbered layers stack in front. Varying the drop shadow offset and blur per layer adds a sense of depth.
layer.folder.title: Folder to display
layer.folder.desc: Shows up to 3 levels deep, including the folder you choose.
layer.mediaKind.title: Media type
layer.shuffle.title: Shuffle
layer.displayMode.title: Display mode
layer.displayMode.desc: Cover the whole screen, fit the entire image, or place it at a random position.
layer.displayMode.desc.cover: Stretches the image across the whole desktop to fill the screen. The aspect ratio is kept, and the overflowing edges are cropped.
layer.displayMode.desc.contain: Shows the entire image centered, scaled to fit within the screen without cropping.
layer.displayMode.desc.random: Places the image at a random position each time.
layer.size.title: Display size
layer.size.desc: Image size relative to the desktop.
layer.size.desc.contain: Fits the image to the screen, then shrinks it to this size.
layer.size.desc.random: The image's area as a fraction of the desktop. At 100% it grows larger than the screen and may be cropped at the edges.
layer.corner.title: Rounded corners
layer.corner.desc: How much to round the image's corners. Based on the desktop's shorter edge, and automatically eased for images shown small.
layer.drift.title: Slow drift
layer.drift.desc: Add an effect that moves the image while it's shown.
layer.flee.title: Avoid the cursor
layer.flee.desc: Moves the shown image away when the cursor nears it.
layer.effect.title: Effect
layer.shadowX.title: Shadow X offset
layer.shadowX.desc: How far to shift the shadow horizontally. Positive falls to the right, negative to the left.
layer.shadowY.title: Shadow Y offset
layer.shadowY.desc: How far to shift the shadow vertically. Positive falls down, negative falls up.
layer.shadowBlur.title: Shadow blur
layer.shadowBlur.desc: How soft the shadow's edge is. Larger spreads softer and looks higher above.
layer.shadowOpacity.title: Shadow strength
layer.shadowOpacity.desc: Opacity of the shadow. Stronger looks more lifted toward you.
layer.displayDuration.title: Display interval
layer.displayDuration.desc: How long a single item stays on screen.
layer.videoPlayFull.title: Play videos to the end
layer.videoPlayFull.desc: Videos longer than the display interval won't switch until playback finishes.
layer.fadeDuration.title: Fade duration
layer.fadeDuration.desc: How long the fade-in and fade-out take.
layer.gapDuration.title: Switch gap
layer.gapDuration.desc: Time after one ends until the next image is shown.
layer.remove.title: Delete this layer
layer.remove.desc: Discard this layer's settings and remove it from the display.
dialog.chooseFolder: Choose a folder of images and videos to display
overlay.initial: No folder selected — choose an image/video folder from the tray icon
overlay.noFolder: No folder selected — choose an image/video folder for each layer in Settings
overlay.noMedia: No displayable images or videos were found
